features: 【Premium Material】Made of premium material, more durable. Hot water bottle can be used as hot or cold compress to relieve muscle soreness, dysmenorrhea, and sports injuries.
【Unique Design】Wide mouth design, so it is easier to fill water.
【Application scenario】The bottle can be used to warm hands, waist, belly, feet and bedspread on cold days.

【Aches & Pain Relief】 If you suffer from bad back, neck, hands and feet, simply fill up and use as a hot compress on the area to ease your pain. It is also the wonderful warm choice for winter travel, camping, hiking or other outdoor activities.
【Ideal for Giving】Can be used as a present of love, to give more warmth and care to the lover.
